ClientKey.title: Client Key (Tenant Domain)
ClientKey.description: OpenWater tenant domain, sent as the 'X-ClientKey' header (e.g. 'demo.secure-platform.com').

ApiKey.title: API Key
ApiKey.description: OpenWater admin API secret, sent as the 'X-ApiKey' header.

OrganizationCode.title: Organization Code
OrganizationCode.description: Optional organization scope, sent as the 'X-OrganizationCode' header when present.
